name: Practice Exam page shows the exam setup for a logged-in user
description: A logged-in user opens /app/exam and sees the real Practice Exam setup UI -- the 'Practice Exam' heading, the guidance about uploading a PDF or pasting notes, and the setup controls to start generating an exam -- rather than a 404, a blank page, or unstyled text. Prior exam history is optional and only shows if the account has taken exams.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the page renders the 'Practice Exam' heading (not a 404 or blank screen) together with the descriptive guidance about uploading a PDF or pasting notes to generate a timed exam

Verify the exam setup controls are present -- an area to provide source material (a file upload control and/or a text area to paste notes) and a control to begin generating the exam -- confirming the setup component rendered rather than an empty container
